title: (YTPMV) E.Via64 - Mega Pick Up
description:
Original Song: E.Via - Chu~! (Pick Up! U!)
Original Source: Mega64

All visuals and audio were done in Vegas Pro

Another really old project resurrected from the dead. Audio for this one started back in 2015 and was always one of my personal favorite projects that I had scrapped, so I couldn't let it die. I have been a big Mega64 fan for longer than I could remember, so I've wanted to make a full fledged Mega64 YTPMV for a long time now. I had a lot of fun making this one, and I'm pretty proud of it, so please enjoy.

Song choice was inspired by:
https://youtu.be/J49ey1YozWI

Marcus sentencing was inspired/copied from:
https://youtu.be/bQjqUMwxdHI

Also check out the YTPMV Podcast:
https://youtu.be/68oKk0-O8vY
